records.question: What programs named Jiajia launched in 2007 or later originate from Guangdong and are owned by Southern Media Corporation (SMC)?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT program.program_id FROM program
WHERE program.name = 'Jiajia' AND program.launch >= 2007.0 AND program.origin = 'Guangdong' AND program.owner = 'Southern Media Corporation (SMC)'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Program_ID FROM program WHERE Name = 'Jiajia' AND Launch >= 2007 AND Origin = 'Guangdong' AND Owner = 'Southern Media Corporation (SMC)'

records.question: Which programs named Kaku, launched in 2004 and originating from Beijing, are owned by Beijing Television (BTV), broadcast at Night on CCTV-4 channels owned by CCTV with a rating of at most 0.26 percent?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT program.program_id FROM program
JOIN broadcast ON program.program_id = broadcast.program_id
JOIN channel ON broadcast.channel_id = channel.channel_id
WHERE program.owner = 'Beijing Television (BTV)' AND broadcast.time_of_day = 'Night' AND program.name = 'Kaku' AND channel.owner = 'CCTV' AND program.launch = 2004.0 AND channel.name = 'CCTV-4' AND program.origin = 'Beijing' AND channel.rating_in_percent <= 0.26
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Program_ID FROM program AS T1 INNER JOIN broadcast AS T2 ON T1.Program_ID = T2.Program_ID INNER JOIN channel AS T3 ON T2.Channel_ID = T3.Channel_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'Kaku' AND T1.Launch = 2004 AND T1.Origin = 'Beijing' AND T1.Owner = 'Beijing Television (BTV)' AND T2.Time_of_day = 'Night' AND T3.Name = 'CCTV-4' AND T3.Owner = 'CCTV' AND T3.Rating_in_percent <= 0.26

records.question: Which programs owned by Shanghai Media Group (SMG) have a broadcast share exactly equal to 3.0 percent?
